suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance in the rust-library-worker skill for event-related milestones: keep dynamics functions pure and emit dynamic transition events through an orchestration layer that compares previous and current dynamics state.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed features (events-system and integration-tests) had to call out this boundary explicitly: dynamic transition events are defined in events, while DynamicsEngine handles transition detection and emission.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed AGENTS.md and rust-library-worker conventions (derive usage, no unsafe, test-first flow).
No services.yaml changes required for this pure library milestone.
Integration tests used transaction batching for scale writes.
